body.purpose: Default text and form fields; 65 to 75ch measure.

mono.purpose: IDs, plates, dates, money, aligned figures.

shadows.name: shadow-1
shadows.purpose: Faint seat under resting raised elements.

shadows.name: shadow-2
shadows.purpose: Hover lift on interactive cards and metrics.

shadows.name: shadow-pop
shadows.purpose: Popovers, side drawer, mobile slide-up sheets.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, press, color).

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Sheet and toast entrances; firm settle, no bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action on a screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; background: var(--acc-forest, oklch(0.40 0.060 148)); color:#fdf8ec; border:0; border-radius:6px; padding:10px 16px; font:600 14px/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition: background .16s cubic-bezier(0.33,1,0.68,1), box-shadow .16s, transform .12s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--acc-forest-hi, oklch(0.48 0.075 148)); box-shadow:0 4px 14px oklch(0.45 0.07 150 / 0.22); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--acc-forest, oklch(0.40 0.060 148)); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower-emphasis actions next to a primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; background: var(--bg-sand, oklch(0.93 0.022 85)); color: var(--ink-700, oklch(0.36 0.020 140)); border:0; border-radius:6px; padding:10px 16px; font:500 14px/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition: background .16s cubic-bezier(0.33,1,0.68,1), transform .12s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--bg-sand-deep, oklch(0.87 0.035 80)); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default form field; label sits above.
components.css: .ds-field { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; } .ds-label { font:500 12px/1.2 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--ink-500, oklch(0.50 0.015 135)); } .ds-input { border:1px solid var(--line, oklch(0.91 0.012 100)); border-radius:9px; padding:10px 12px; font:400 14px Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; background:#fff; color: var(--ink-900, oklch(0.22 0.018 145)); transition: border-color .16s, box-shadow .16s; } .ds-input:focus { outline:none; border-color: var(--acc-moss, oklch(0.62 0.090 145)); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--acc-moss-bg, oklch(0.93 0.030 145)); }

components.name: Filter Pill
components.description: Toggleable filter; active gets moss tint.
components.css: .ds-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; border:1px solid var(--line-strong, oklch(0.84 0.018 100)); background:#fff; color: var(--ink-700, oklch(0.36 0.020 140)); border-radius:999px; padding:5px 10px; font:500 12px Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition: background .16s, border-color .16s, transform .12s; } .ds-pill:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-pill-active { background: var(--acc-moss-bg, oklch(0.93 0.030 145)); color: var(--acc-forest, oklch(0.40 0.060 148)); border-color: var(--acc-moss, oklch(0.62 0.090 145)); } .ds-dot { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:2px; background: currentColor; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Raised surface for a grouped record. Flat at rest, lifts on hover when interactive.
components.html:
National Guard - Makkah
12 مهمة نشطة
components.css: .ds-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid var(--line, oklch(0.91 0.012 100)); border-radius:10px; padding:14px; transition: box-shadow .18s cubic-bezier(0.33,1,0.68,1), transform .18s, border-color .18s; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow:0 6px 24px -8px oklch(0.2 0.02 130 / 0.10); } .ds-card-title { font:600 16px/1.3 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--ink-900, oklch(0.22 0.018 145)); } .ds-card-meta { margin-top:4px; font:400 13px Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--ink-500, oklch(0.50 0.015 135)); }

components.name: Mobile Tab Bar Item
components.description: Bottom-nav item on mobile; active in forest, optional count badge.
components.css: .ds-mtab { flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:3px; padding:7px 2px 5px; min-height:49px; background:none; border:0; color: var(--ink-400, oklch(0.57 0.012 130)); border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; transition: color .12s, background .12s; } .ds-mtab-active { color: var(--acc-forest, oklch(0.40 0.060 148)); } .ds-mtab-ic { position:relative; display:grid; place-items:center; } .ds-mtab-lbl { font:500 10.5px/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-mtab-badge { position:absolute; top:-6px; inset-inline-end:-9px; min-width:15px; height:15px; padding:0 4px; border-radius:8px; background: oklch(0.58 0.130 32); color:#fff; font:700 9.5px/15px Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; text-align:center; }

narrative.overview: The surface of a working desk in a support-services department, not a showcase. Everything needed for the current job is within reach, laid out so the next action is obvious. Earthy and grounded (forest green on warm off-white), quiet type, Western numerals so a bilingual team reads numbers the same way in Arabic and English. Density is calm, not cramped: real operational data without a wall of identical tiles. Color is reserved; green marks the primary path and status hues carry meaning. The Arabic experience is primary, fully RTL, Thmanyah for Arabic glyphs and Geist for Latin and digits.
keyCharacteristics: Earthy forest-green primary on warm off-white; status color carries meaning, never decoration.
Arabic-first, full RTL, Western numerals everywhere.
Calm density: enough data to decide, never a tile wall.
Tactile feedback: press depresses, hover lifts, focus rings are clear.
Light and dark themes from one OKLCH token set.

rules.name: The Reserved Green Rule
rules.body: Forest green marks the primary path only (one primary action, the active nav item, links). Above ~10% of a screen it stops meaning primary and becomes decoration.

rules.name: The Meaningful Color Rule
rules.body: The four status hues are forbidden as decoration. Red is always urgent, amber always needs attention; use a neutral tint to add color instead.

rules.name: The Western Numerals Rule
rules.body: All digits, Arabic or English, are Western (1234567890), never Eastern-Arabic. A stray ٥ is a bug.

rules.name: The Two-Step Scale Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy comes from weight plus a clear size step (~1.25), not many sizes. Display 20 over Body 14 over Label 12.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat by default. Shadows appear only as a response to state: hover lifts, overlays float. A still card with a drop shadow is wrong.

dos: Do keep Forest green to ~10 percent of a screen: one primary action, the active nav, links.
Do use Western numerals (1234567890) everywhere, in both languages.
Do keep body text at Ink 700 or darker on any tint; verify AA contrast (>=4.5:1 body, >=3:1 large).
Do pair every status with a dot or icon, not color alone.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; let hover lift and overlays float.
Do test Arabic copy at every breakpoint for overflow.
donts: Don't build the generic card-grid SaaS look: endless identical icon-heading-text cards or the big-number hero-metric template.
Don't drift toward a cluttered government-portal feel: dense, ungrouped, hard-to-scan screens.
Don't use status hues as decoration; they always carry meaning.
Don't use side-stripe borders (a colored border-left/right over 1px) on cards, list rows, or callouts.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or bouncy/elastic motion.
